matrix.generation_rule: Use user-intent labels, never bare sitemap labels. Require distinct final URLs and both description lines.
Use confirmed value props that apply at the selected account branch.
Use approved headers. Prefer Services and service-area lists when evidence supports them.

limits.phone_number: must match website or client evidence

matrix.generation_rule: Generate only when website evidence has one confirmed phone number.
Generate only from explicit website prices. Skip if fewer than 3 price points are visible.
Generate only when explicit promotion or sale evidence exists.

editor_fields: manifest only until Editor import/export is verified
matrix.generation_rule: Copy only local image files with basic dimension evidence into the review import package.

editor_fields: manifest only until Editor import/export is verified
matrix.generation_rule: Require website logo evidence and flag approval depends on advertiser verification.
Generate when inferred name fits limits. Human review must confirm legal or domain match.
Do not fake location assets. Create GBP linking review task when not confirmed.
